education.thesis: Injectable hydrogel scaffolds for sustained antimicrobial peptide delivery

projects.title: Injectable antimicrobial hydrogel
projects.description: Designed a chitosan-gelatin injectable hydrogel and evaluated swelling, degradation, and antimicrobial release kinetics.

publications.title: Sustained release antimicrobial hydrogels for infected wound models

intro_call_summary: Student wants a funded PhD in biomaterials or regenerative medicine, ideally with translational work on hydrogels, wound healing, antimicrobial delivery, and scaffold design. Open to engineering departments, biomedical engineering, or materials science groups.
raw_resume_text: MSc thesis on injectable hydrogels. Experience with chitosan gelatin scaffolds, antimicrobial peptides, release kinetics, mammalian cell culture, microscopy, and Python data analysis.
